#ScoreComments
1 0.80
  • proper name 'Kath' vs 'Cat'
  • missing/incorrect proper name for 'Bobo'
2 0.80
  • Substantive content: 'CNN is picking up Toronto' vs 'seeing it...it's picking up drama'

  • Dropped line: 'I want boy to get in the picture.'
